zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Wasteneys於1321年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可爾頓時，他的父親William de Wasteneys32歲，母親Joanna le Brett24歲。他與Joan de Toly結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1364年在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Wasteneys于1321年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾可爾頓时，他的父亲William de Wasteneys32岁，母亲Joanna le Brett24岁。他与Joan de Toly结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1364年在他的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾可爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wasteneys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from the Norman French pronunciation of le Gâtinais (formerly Gastinois), a province occupying parts of the modern Seine-et-Marne and Loiret.

variants.name: Westney
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Westan-ig, from westan, west, and ig, an island, meaning a Western island

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Wasteneys was born in 1321, in Colton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Wasteneys, was 32 and his mother, Joanna le Brett, was 24. He married Joan de Toly. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1364, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Colton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Wasteneys est né en 1321, à Colton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Wasteneys, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joanna le Brett, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Toly. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1364, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Colton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Wasteneys 1321 in Colton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Wasteneys 32 und seine Mutter Joanna le Brett 24. Er hat Joan de Toly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1364 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Colton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Wasteneys è nato il nel 1321 nel Colton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Wasteneys, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joanna le Brett, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Toly. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1364, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Colton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Wasteneysが1321年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアコルトンで生まれた時，父William de Wasteneysは32歳，母Joanna le Brettは24歳であった。Joan de Tolyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1364年に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアコルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Wasteneys(이)가 1321년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 콜턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Wasteneys(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna le Brett(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Joan de Toly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1364년 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 콜턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Wasteneys nasceu em 1321, em Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Wasteneys, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joanna le Brett, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Toly. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1364, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Wasteneys родился в 1321 г. в местности колтон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Wasteneys было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna le Brett, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Toly. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1364 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности колтон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Wasteneys nació en 1321, en Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Wasteneys, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joanna le Brett, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan de Toly. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1364, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
